title: Wide CB Outlet Support
description: You are the right central midfielder. The right centre-back has the ball under pressure from a high press. Provide a strong-side outlet and an escape lane to relieve pressure and restart the build-out.
teaching_point: Offer a strong-side outlet lane beside the pressed CB and a diagonal escape pocket behind the first press line.

feedback_hints.success: You provided a clear outlet lane and helped the CB escape the high press.
feedback_hints.common_error: You positioned too close or in line with the press, making it easy to block the outlet pass.
feedback_hints.alternate_valid: This position still offered the CB a usable escape option even outside the primary lane.
feedback_hints.teaching_emphasis: Position in the lane beside the pressing opponent — not behind them — so the CB can play forward quickly.
success_points: You offered an open outlet lane beside the pressing opponent, giving the CB a clean forward pass.
Your position outside the press shadow meant the CB could play to you without the ball going through a presser.
You created the diagonal escape angle the CB needed to relieve the press and restart build-out.
error_points: You positioned in line with or behind the press, letting the pressing opponent block the passing lane to you.
You were too close to the CB, making it easy for a single opponent to cover both of you.
Your position did not provide a clear escape angle — the CB still had no safe forward option.
alternate_points: This was a usable outlet — slightly wide of ideal but still outside the press shadow.
You gave the CB an escape option even if not perfectly in the strongest part of the outlet lane.
